tasks.label: cleanup-apphost-processes
args: $workspace = '${workspaceFolder}'.Replace('/', '\'); $workspacePattern = [regex]::Escape($workspace); for ($i = 0; $i -lt 5; $i++) { $targets = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { ($_.Name -eq 'dotnet.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match $workspacePattern -and $_.CommandLine -match 'gitlab-milestone-extensions\.(AppHost|ApiService|Web)') -or ($_.Name -eq 'dotnet.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'Aspire\.Dashboard') -or ($_.Name -in @('dcp.exe', 'dcpctrl.exe', 'gitlab-milestone-extensions.AppHost.exe')) }; if (-not $targets) { break }; foreach ($p in $targets) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300 }; dotnet build-server shutdown *> $null
